## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding conventions (file-scoped namespaces, XML doc comments, match existing style).
- [ ] I have added XML documentation comments for new public APIs.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation in `docs/` if applicable.
- [ ] If I added new type mappings, I updated the type mapping unit tests.
- [ ] If I added new analyzer rules, I followed the FC### numbering convention and added corresponding tests.
- [ ] I have updated `CHANGELOG.md` with my changes (if this PR represents a user-facing change).
- [ ] This PR does not introduce compiler warnings.
